violations.text: Cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Cookies were removed from self-service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen, ware washing, and service areas are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025

Cases of beverages were observed stored on the floor in the office/stock room. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Staff relocated beverages during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2025
The ceiling in the kitchen, ware washing, and service area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
Insulation on heating duct in storage room was observed torn. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2025

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black and orange residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machine must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

Grab and Go case for salads was observed at 49 degrees Fahrenheit. Equipment was taken out of service during time of inspection. Equipment cannot be used until properly adjusted, repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The ceiling in the service area, back kitchen and warewashing areas are covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2025
